title: Reload Again
description: A "Better Vanilla" mod pack, based on (my) other pack "Reload BetterVanilla". Going away from strictly vanilla-based additions and looking to add a vanilla feeling and comfortable changes
body:
A simple modpack, having much of optimization out of the box - just like Reload BetterVanilla. Uses vanilla-assuring mods and improvements to gameplay and playing experience.
Furthermore adds some personally chosen mods that I feel could be nice to have ingame when used. This mod pack is my own iteration of added vanilla to the game.
Feel free to change and use the modpack. Future changes and updates could replace the mods that will be focused on here.
